zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Wyther於1574年1月13日出生在英國素福爾可武爾皮特時，她的父親Thomas Wyther26歲，母親Margaret Nash22歲。她於1600年3月27日與George Packard在英國素福爾可武爾皮特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1652年8月19日在英國素福爾可斯托馬可特享年78歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Wyther于1574年1月13日出生在英国素福爾可武爾皮特时，她的父亲Thomas Wyther26岁，母亲Margaret Nash22岁。她于1600年3月27日与George Packard在英国素福爾可武爾皮特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1652年8月19日在英国素福爾可斯托馬可特享年78岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wyther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wither or its Old Norse cognate Vitharr, Withar.
perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a willow tree, from an agent derivative of Middle English withi ‘willow’ (Old English wīthig). Compare Withey .

variants.name: Withey
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a willow tree, Middle English withy (Old English wīthig).

variants.name: Withers
meanings: English: variant of Wither , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Wyther was born on 13 January 1574, in Woolpit, Suffolk, England, her father, Thomas Wyther, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Nash, was 22. She married George Packard on 27 March 1600, in Woolpit, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 August 1652, in Stowmarket, Suffolk, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Wyther est née le 13 janvier 1574, à Woolpit, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wyther, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Nash, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé George Packard le 27 mars 1600, à Woolpit, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 août 1652, à Stowmarket, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Wyther am 13. Januar 1574 in Woolpit, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wyther 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Nash 22. Sie hat am 27. März 1600 in Woolpit, Suffolk, England George Packard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. August 1652 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Stowmarket, Suffolk, England und wurde in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Wyther è nata il il 13 gennaio 1574 nel Woolpit, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Wyther, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Nash, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato George Packard il 27 marzo 1600, nel Woolpit, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 agosto 1652, nel Stowmarket, Suffolk, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Wytherが1574年1月13日にイギリススフォルクウルパトで生まれた時，父Thomas Wytherは26歳，母Margaret Nashは22歳であった。1600年3月27日にイギリススフォルクウルパトでGeorge Packardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1652年8月19日にイギリススフォルクストウマーケトで78歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクストンハム アスプアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Wyther(이)가 1574년 1월 13일 영국 수폴크 보피에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wyther(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Nash(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1600년 3월 27일 영국 수폴크 보피에서 George Packard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1652년 8월 19일 영국 수폴크 스타우마크트에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스토함 아스팔에 묻혔다.

pt.13 January 1574–19 August 1652: 13 de janeiro de 1574–19 de agosto de 1652
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Wyther nasceu em 13 de janeiro de 1574, em Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wyther, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Nash, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com George Packard em 27 de março de 1600, em Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1652, em Stowmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Wyther родилась 13 января 1574 г. в местности вулпит, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wyther было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Nash, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Packard 27 марта 1600 г. в местности вулпит, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 августа 1652 г. в местности стоумаркет, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности стонам аспаль, суффолк, Англия.

es.13 January 1574–19 August 1652: 13 de enero de 1574–19 de agosto de 1652
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Wyther nació el 13 de enero de 1574, en Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wyther, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Nash, tenía 22 años. Se casó con George Packard el 27 de marzo de 1600, en Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1652, en Stowmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
